zh.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon I是Jordon De Kenyon Lord of Kenyon的兒子，於大約1233年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾凱尼恩。他和Godith de Lauton至少有11個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1303年享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kenyon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Warrington, which is of uncertain etymology. There was formerly an ancient burial mound there and Ekwall has speculated that the name is a shortened form of a British name composed of the elements crūc ‘mound’ + a personal name cognate with Welsh Einion (see Eynon ).

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinín ‘son of Coinín’, a byname based on a diminutive of cano ‘wolf’, also Anglicized as Canning and Cunneen . The similarity to the borrowed word coinín ‘coney, rabbit’ has sometimes caused this name to be Anglicized as Rabbitt .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhinghin, ‘son of Finghen’, a personal name meaning ‘fair-born’.

variants.name: Eynon
meanings: Welsh: from Enniaun, an old Welsh personal name ultimately derived from Late Latin Annianus, but also associated with Welsh einion ‘anvil’, taken as implying stability and fortitude. See also Beynon and compare Onion .

variants.name: Kinion
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Kenyon  . Compare   Kinyon  .

variants.name: Kinyon
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Kenyon  . Compare   Kinion  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon I was born about 1233, in Kenyon, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Jordon De Kenyon Lord of Kenyon. He had at least 11 sons and 2 daughters with Godith de Lauton. He died in 1303, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon I est né environ 1233, à Kenyon, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Jordon De Kenyon Lord of Kenyon. Il a eu au moins 11 fils et 2 filles avec Godith de Lauton. Il est décédé en 1303, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon I wurde um 1233 in Kenyon, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Jordon De Kenyon Lord of Kenyon geboren. Er hatte mit Godith de Lauton mindestens 11 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1303 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon I è nato il circa 1233 nel Kenyon, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Jordon De Kenyon Lord of Kenyon. Lui avuto almeno 11 figli e 2 figlie con Godith de Lauton. Morì nel 1303, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon Iは約1233年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアケニーオンでJordon De Kenyon Lord of Kenyonの息子として生まれた。彼はGodith de Lautonとの間に少なくとも11人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1303年に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon I(은)는 대략 1233년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 켄욘에서 Jordon De Kenyon Lord of Kenyon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Godith de Lauton(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1303년 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon I nasceu aproximadamente 1233, em Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Jordon De Kenyon Lord of Kenyon. Ele teve pelo menos 11 filhos e 2 filhas com Godith de Lauton. Ele faleceu em 1303, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon I родился около 1233 г. в местности кенен, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Jordon De Kenyon Lord of Kenyon. У него было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 2 дочери от Godith de Lauton. Он умер в 1303 г. в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon I nació aproximadamente 1233, en Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Jordon De Kenyon Lord of Kenyon. Tuvo por lo menos 11 hijos y 2 hijas con Godith de Lauton. Murió en 1303, a la edad de 71 años.
